calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mayela Vado, Appellant appearing in propria persona.
Mirta Bermudez, Respondent appearing in propria persona with interpreter Angel Morales

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and interpreter are sworn.

Mayela Vado testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appelant's Exhibit 1 - handwritten promissory note

Mirta Bermudez testifies on her own behalf with the assistance of the spanish interpreter. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent's exhibit A - handwritten letter

At the conclusion of the hearing the Court renders its decision in open court.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not reported (624)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-12-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Off Calendar

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Judgment Entered
